name: Sub-Zero
description:
Kuai Liang made his playable debut in Mortal Kombat II as a Lin Kuei assassin and the younger brother of Bi-Han, who was the original Sub-Zero in the original Mortal Kombat arcade game. He takes the mantle of Sub-Zero in his later appearances in the series but reappears under his original alias of Tundra in Mortal Kombat (2011) before again going under the mantle of Sub-Zero.

//Sub-Zero was always my favorite Mortal Kombat character.//

Avatar by https://www.deviantart.com/jayraya
